title: mesosphaerum nervosum
intro: Mesosphaerum nervosum, also known as West Indian lemon balm, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum nervosum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Mesosphaerum nervosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
